title: Ahtna Design-Build’s joint venture with CDM Smith helped the US Army Corps of Engineers
summary: In just 19 days, Ahtna Design-Build’s joint venture with CDM Smith helped the US Army Corps of Engineers, Omaha District convert a vacant floor of Montana Children’s into an alternate care facility to increase hospital capacity during the coronavirus pandemic. Learn more about the project .

title: Update on 2020 CSH – Unit 11 and Unit 13 CSH Moose as of August 31, 2020
